summary: The user is planning a business trip from New York to Los Angeles and seeks recommendations for airlines with reliable in-flight entertainment systems, expressing dissatisfaction with American Airlines. They decide to consider Delta Air Lines for their flight due to positive past experiences with Delta's meal service and inquire about maximizing Delta SkyMiles for a future trip to Miami.
facts: The user recently flew with American Airlines from New York to Los Angeles and had a terrible experience with their entertainment system. The user is considering Delta Air Lines or Virgin America for their upcoming business trip from New York to Los Angeles. The user prefers Delta Air Lines for their flight due to a good experience with their meal service in the past. The user received a voucher for a free drink on their next flight from American Airlines after a flight attendant apologized for the broken entertainment system. The user was approved for the Citi / AAdvantage Executive credit card and is excited to start earning more miles. The user is planning a trip from Boston to Miami in late summer or early fall and is flexible with their travel dates. Delta's award chart for domestic flights includes 10,000 - 12,500 miles for Main Cabin, 15,000 - 17,500 miles for Comfort+, and 25,000 - 30,000 miles for First Class. The user is interested in maximizing their Delta SkyMiles redemption for their trip to Miami.
